title: Transaction
description: Represents a financial transaction record, encompassing invoices, payments, receipts, journals, orders, and quotes. Internal Name: Transaction (file_num: 5).

SequenceNumber.description: Internal unique identifier for the transaction record. Indexed.

LastModifiedTime.description: Timestamp indicating the last time the transaction record was modified.

OurRef.description: Internal reference number (e.g., invoice number, cheque number, receipt number, journal number). Indexed. (Mutable: conditionally)

TransDate.description: The primary date associated with the transaction (e.g., invoice date, payment date). Indexed. (Mutable: conditionally)

EnterDate.description: The date the transaction was entered into the system. Indexed.

DueDate.description: The date payment is due for invoices. (Mutable: conditionally)

Period.description: The accounting period to which the transaction is assigned. Indexed.

Type.description: The type of the transaction. Determines its accounting behaviour. Indexed.

TheirRef.description: The reference number provided by the other party (e.g., supplier's invoice number, customer's PO number). (Mutable: freely, script-only)

NameCode.description: The code linking this transaction to a customer, supplier, or other contact in the Name table. Indexed.

Flag.description: A user-defined flag for categorization or marking. Non-empty value displays a flag icon in lists. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Description.description: A detailed description of the transaction purpose or content. (Mutable: conditionally)

Gross.description: The total gross amount of the transaction (tax inclusive).

Analysis.description: A user-defined code for analysis, reporting, or grouping (e.g., batch number, department, project). (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Contra.description: The primary balancing account code (e.g., Bank account for payments/receipts, Accounts Payable/Receivable for invoices).

ToFrom.description: The name of the party the transaction is to or from (e.g., Payee, Payer). Often populated from the linked Name record. (Mutable: conditionally)

Status.description: Indicates whether the transaction has been posted to the ledger. Indexed.

Hold.description: If true, the transaction cannot be posted. (Mutable: conditionally)

DatePaid.description: For invoices, the date the last payment was received/made.

AmtPaid.description: For invoices, the total amount paid against this invoice to date.

PayAmount.description: For creditor payments, the amount allocated to be paid in the next payment run.

Aging.description: The aging cycle number when this transaction was last aged (relevant for open-item statements).

TaxAmount.description: The total tax amount calculated for the transaction.

TaxCycle.description: The GST/VAT/Tax reporting cycle number in which this transaction was finalized.

Recurring.description: Flag indicating if this is a recurring transaction template.

Printed.description: Status indicating if the transaction form (invoice, cheque, etc.) has been printed (0=No, 1=Yes). (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Flags.description: A bitmask field storing various boolean settings/attributes for the transaction (e.g., Was Cancelled, Is Job Invoice).

TaxProcessed.description: Internal field related to tax processing.

Salesperson.description: The code of the salesperson associated with this transaction. Can be used for reporting or departmental allocation. (Mutable: conditionally)

Colour.description: A user-assigned colour index (0-7) for visual identification in lists. Labels are user-defined in preferences. (Mutable: conditionally)

BankJNSeq.description: The sequence number of the Banking Journal transaction if this receipt was banked using the Banking command.

PaymentMethod.description: Indicates the method of payment or receipt.

TimePosted.description: Timestamp indicating when the transaction was posted.

SecurityLevel.description: The highest security level assigned to any of the detail lines in this transaction. Indexed.

PromptPaymentDate.description: The date by which payment must be made to receive a prompt payment discount. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

PromptPaymentAmt.description: The calculated amount of the prompt payment discount available.

ProdPriceCode.description: The product pricing level (A-F) applied to this transaction.

MailingAddress.description: The specific mailing address used for this transaction, overriding the default from the Name record if necessary. (Mutable: conditionally)

DeliveryAddress.description: The specific delivery address used for this transaction, overriding the default from the Name record if necessary. (Mutable: conditionally)

FreightCode.description: The product code used for freight charges on this order/invoice.

FreightAmount.description: The amount charged for freight on this order/invoice.

FreightDetails.description: Additional details regarding the freight charges. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

SpecialBank.description: Special bank identifier, potentially used for specific payment types or integrations. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

SpecialBranch.description: Special bank branch identifier. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

SpecialAccount.description: Special bank account identifier. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Currency.description: The currency code for the transaction (e.g., 'USD', 'EUR'). Empty for base currency.

ExchangeRate.description: The exchange rate applied to this foreign currency transaction. 0 for base currency.

EnteredBy.description: The initials of the user who originally entered the transaction.

PostedBy.description: The initials of the user who posted the transaction.

AmtWrittenOff.description: The amount of this invoice that has been written off.

OrderTotal.description: The total value of the associated order (for invoices generated from orders).

OrderShipped.description: The value of goods shipped on the associated order.

OrderDeposit.description: The amount of deposit recorded against the associated order.

OriginatingOrderSeq.description: The SequenceNumber of the Sales Order or Purchase Order from which this invoice was generated.

CurrencyTransferSeq.description: The SequenceNumber of the related transaction in a currency transfer pair.

PromptPaymentTerms.description: The specific prompt payment terms code applied to this transaction (overriding Name record).

PromptPaymentDisc.description: The specific prompt payment discount percentage applied to this transaction.

ApprovedBy1.description: Initials of the first user who approved this transaction (if approval workflow is used). (Mutable: conditionally, script-only)

ApprovedBy2.description: Initials of the second user who approved this transaction (if approval workflow is used). (Mutable: conditionally, script-only)

UserNum.description: A user-defined number field for custom data storage, often used by scripts. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

UserText.description: A user-defined text field for custom data storage, often used by scripts. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

TaggedText.description: Stores key-value pairs for custom data, primarily accessed via scripting functions GetTaggedValue/SetTaggedValue. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Emailed.description: Status indicating if the transaction form has been emailed (0=No, 1=Yes). (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Transferred.description: Status related to electronic transfer (e.g., eInvoicing sent status). (Mutable: freely, script-only)
